name: Camp Ponderosa
description: Building is not heated in Winter. Dress warm.
open_play_schedule: Please check-in with camp host at entering main facility.

name: Eagle Nest Rv Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Eagle Nest Rv Resort in Polson, MT! There are 3 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Flathead Lake Lodge
description: Flathead Lake Lodge is a place to play pickleball in Bigfork, MT. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Montana Athletic Club - Flathead Valley Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Montana Athletic Club - Flathead Valley Pickleball in Bigfork, MT! There are 11 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 9 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: O'Malley Park
description: O'Malley Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, MT. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Silverman Private Lakeside Court
description:
3.5 rated players or higher are welcome to play on one of the prettiest courts in Montana (according to all-time champion and friend. Scott Moore.

Lessons can also be arranged for players wishing to improve their "soft game."

name: Two Rivers Pickleball Club
description: Come play pickleball at Two Rivers Pickleball Club in Bigfork, MT! There are 10 acrylic courts. 4 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
